zh.Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭斯林史爾班諾可本
zh.Stapleton, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾斯塔普萊頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Miles Stapleton I於大約1263年出生在英國越可爾斯塔普萊頓時，他的父親Nicholas Stapleton II35歲，母親Margery Basset25歲。他於大約1286年與Sibyl Bellew在英國越可爾貝達爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1313年被列為member of parliament。他去世於1314年6月23日在蘇格蘭斯林史爾班諾可本享年52歲。

zh-hans.Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland: 苏格兰斯林史爾班諾可本
zh-hans.Stapleton, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾斯塔普萊頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Miles Stapleton I于大约1263年出生在英国越可爾斯塔普萊頓时，他的父亲Nicholas Stapleton II35岁，母亲Margery Basset25岁。他于大约1286年与Sibyl Bellew在英国越可爾貝達爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1313年被列为member of parliament。他去世于1314年6月23日在苏格兰斯林史爾班諾可本享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stapleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Stapleton (in Devon, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Herefordshire, Shropshire, Leicestershire, North Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Cumberland), all named in Old English with stapol ‘post, pillar’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The name is common in Ireland, where it has been established since medieval times in the counties of Tipperary and Kilkenny.

nameMeanings.name: Miles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin but uncertain derivation. Unlike most Norman names it is, as far as can be ascertained, not derived from any known Old French or Germanic name element. It may be a greatly altered pet form of Michael , which came to be associated with the Latin word miles ‘soldier’ because of the military attributes of the archangel Michael. However, the usual Latin form of the name in the Middle Ages was Milo. There is a common Slavic name element mil ‘grace, favour’, with which it may possibly have some connection. The name has been in regular use in England since the 16th century. See also Milo and Myles .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Miles Stapleton I was born about 1263, in Stapleton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Nicholas Stapleton II, was 35 and his mother, Margery Basset, was 25. He married Sibyl Bellew about 1286, in Bedale, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. In 1313, his occupation is listed as member of parliament. He died on 23 June 1314, in Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Miles Stapleton I est né environ 1263, à Stapleton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Stapleton II, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margery Basset, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Sibyl Bellew environ 1286, à Bedale, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. En 1313, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament. Il est décédé le 23 juin 1314, à Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Miles Stapleton I um 1263 in Stapleton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Stapleton II 35 und seine Mutter Margery Basset 25. Er hat um 1286 in Bedale, Yorkshire, England Sibyl Bellew geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1313 ist sein Beruf als member of parliament aufgeführt. Er starb am 23. Juni 1314 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Miles Stapleton I è nato il circa 1263 nel Stapleton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Nicholas Stapleton II, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Margery Basset, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Sibyl Bellew circa 1286, nel Bedale, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1313, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament. Morì il 23 giugno 1314, nel Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.Stapleton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアスタプレトン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Miles Stapleton Iが約1263年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスタプレトンで生まれた時，父Nicholas Stapleton IIは35歳，母Margery Bassetは25歳であった。約1286年にイギリスヨークシュアイアベダルでSibyl Bellewと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1313年，職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1314年6月23日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアバノクブルンで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Miles Stapleton I(이)가 대략 1263년 영국 요르크실르 스타플레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Stapleton II(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Basset(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1286년 영국 요르크실르 베데일에서 Sibyl Bellew(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1313년, 그의 직업은 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1314년 6월 23일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 반옥k번에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Miles Stapleton I nasceu aproximadamente 1263, em Stapleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Stapleton II, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margery Basset, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Sibyl Bellew aproximadamente 1286, em Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1313, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament. Ele faleceu em 23 de junho de 1314, em Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Miles Stapleton I родился около 1263 г. в местности стаплетон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Stapleton II было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Basset, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibyl Bellew около 1286 г. в местности бедеил, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. В 1313 году он работал по профессии member of parliament. Он умер 23 июня 1314 г. в местности банноккбурн, стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Miles Stapleton I nació aproximadamente 1263, en Stapleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Stapleton II, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margery Basset, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sibyl Bellew aproximadamente 1286, en Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. En 1313, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament. Murió el 23 de junio de 1314, en Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland, a la edad de 52 años.
